description.value:
Frequency once per hour

You let out a psychic droning sound that interferes with telepathic communication. Other creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:15] around you must attempt a @Check[will|against:spell-class|options:area-effect,damaging-effect,inflicts:confused,inflicts:deafened] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Deafened] and is unable to communicate telepathically for 1 round.

Failure As success, and the creature also takes @Damage[3d8[mental]|options:area-damage] damage.

Critical Failure As success, and the creature also takes @Damage[6d8[mental]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Confused] until the end of their next turn.
